import React , { useState,useEffect } from "react"; import logo from "./images/logo.jpeg"; import AiTeacher from "./images/aiBackground.jpg"; import Container from 'react-bootstrap/Container'; import Nav from 'react-bootstrap/Nav'; import Navbar from 'react-bootstrap/Navbar'; import "./home2.css"; import Row from 'react-bootstrap/Row'; import Col from 'react-bootstrap/Col'; import Button from 'react-bootstrap/Button'; import Form from 'react-bootstrap/Form'; import { useNavigate ,Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import styled from 'styled-components'; import Card from 'react-bootstrap/Card'; const Background = styled.div` background-image: url(${AiTeacher}); background-size: cover; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center; height: 100vh; width: 100vw; `; function HomePage(){ return (
Home Login Registration

Smart Learning Management System

What it is ? Card Subtitle A smart tutor that helps you understand difficult concepts, generates auto-graded assessments, and shows your knowledge percentage for each chapter in your textbooks. How It Works Card Subtitle
  • Assistant reader - it reads your textbook for you
  • 24/7 available AI teacher that you can ask questions
  • Auto-generated assessments to test your knowledge
  • Test scores are saved for teachers to know the high & least performing students based on each chapter
 Why SmartLMS? Card Subtitle
  • Generates and grades quizzes automatically, saving time for teachers.
  • Tracks student performance and highlights strengths and weaknesses.
  • Gives teachers detailed reports on high- and low-performing students by chapter.
  • Test scores are saved for teachers to know the high & least performing students based on each chapter
); } export default HomePage;
